features.description: ChClient has query methods for RBAC entities, named collections, and user-defined functions

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn query_rbac_objects' src/clickhouse/client.rs && grep -c 'pub async fn query_named_collections' src/clickhouse/client.rs && grep -c 'pub async fn query_user_defined_functions' src/clickhouse/client.rs
layers.fail_message: query_rbac_objects, query_named_collections, or query_user_defined_functions method not found in ChClient

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | tail -1
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after adding ChClient methods

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test --lib query_rbac -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'
layers.fail_message: ChClient RBAC query tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: ChClient methods require live ClickHouse connection for real testing; unit tests verify SQL generation and error handling only

alternative_verification.command: cargo test --lib query_rbac -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

features.description: Backup creates access/ directory with .jsonl RBAC files, copies config files, populates manifest.named_collections and manifest.functions

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn backup_rbac_and_configs' src/backup/rbac.rs && grep -c 'pub mod rbac' src/backup/mod.rs && grep -c 'RbacEntry' src/backup/rbac.rs && grep -c 'backup_functions' src/backup/rbac.rs
layers.fail_message: backup_rbac_and_configs, RbacEntry, or backup_functions not found in backup/rbac.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | tail -1
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors in backup RBAC module

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test --lib backup_rbac -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'
layers.fail_message: Backup RBAC unit tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Backup requires live ClickHouse for RBAC system table queries; integration test coverage deferred to CI with real ClickHouse

alternative_verification.command: cargo test --lib backup_rbac -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

features.description: Upload and download pipelines handle access/ and configs/ directories

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'upload_simple_directory' src/upload/mod.rs && grep -c 'download_simple_directory' src/download/mod.rs
layers.fail_message: upload_simple_directory or download_simple_directory function not found

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | tail -1
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors in upload/download module

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test --lib upload_access -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok' ; cargo test --lib download_access -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'
layers.fail_message: Upload/download access directory tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Upload/download require real S3 connection; integration test coverage deferred to CI

alternative_verification.command: cargo test --lib upload_access -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

features.description: Restore named collections with ON CLUSTER support, and DDL-based RBAC restore with rbac_resolve_conflicts (recreate/ignore/fail) from .jsonl files

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn restore_named_collections' src/restore/rbac.rs && grep -c 'pub async fn restore_rbac' src/restore/rbac.rs && grep -c 'make_drop_ddl' src/restore/rbac.rs
layers.fail_message: restore_named_collections, restore_rbac, or make_drop_ddl not found in restore/rbac.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | tail -1
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors in restore RBAC module

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test --lib restore_named_collections -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok' && cargo test --lib rbac_restore -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'
layers.fail_message: restore_named_collections or rbac_restore tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Named collections and RBAC restore requires live ClickHouse; unit tests verify DDL generation, .jsonl parsing, and conflict resolution logic

alternative_verification.command: cargo test --lib restore_named_collections -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

features.description: Restore config files, execute restart_command with exec:/sql: prefixes, and Phase 4 extensions wired in both normal and schema-only restore paths

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'pub async fn restore_configs' src/restore/rbac.rs && grep -c 'pub async fn execute_restart_commands' src/restore/rbac.rs && grep -c 'restore_named_collections' src/restore/mod.rs
layers.fail_message: restore_configs or execute_restart_commands not found, or Phase 4 extensions not wired in both restore paths (expected 2 occurrences in mod.rs for normal + schema-only)

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | tail -1
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors in restore RBAC module

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test --lib execute_restart_commands -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'
layers.fail_message: execute_restart_commands tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Config restore and restart_command require filesystem access to ClickHouse data directory and running ClickHouse; unit tests verify file operations and command parsing

alternative_verification.command: cargo test --lib execute_restart_commands -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

features.description: All 12 RBAC/configs/named-collections warn stubs removed from main.rs, flags wired through to backup::create and restore::restore at all call sites

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'rbac flag is not yet implemented\|configs flag is not yet implemented\|named-collections flag is not yet implemented' src/main.rs || echo 0
layers.fail_message: Still have RBAC/configs/named-collections 'not yet implemented' warnings in main.rs

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | tail -1
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors after wiring flags

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test --lib test_create_request -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'
layers.fail_message: Server request type tests failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.fail_message: Runtime integration requires real ClickHouse + S3 (CI test)

features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules

layers.name: structural
layers.command: for m in src/backup src/restore src/clickhouse src/upload src/download src/server; do test -f "$m/CLAUDE.md" || echo "MISSING: $m/CLAUDE.md"; done && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: One or more CLAUDE.md files missing

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: echo 'N/A - documentation only'

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: for m in src/backup src/restore src/clickhouse src/upload src/download src/server; do grep -q 'Parent Context' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Directory Structure' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Key Patterns' "$m/CLAUDE.md" && grep -q 'Parent Rules' "$m/CLAUDE.md" || echo "FAIL: $m missing required sections"; done && echo VALID
layers.fail_message: CLAUDE.md missing required sections

alternative_verification.command: grep -q 'rbac' src/backup/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'rbac' src/restore/CLAUDE.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL
